LanguageData.Ammo_EltexCap.label: eltex capacitor
LanguageData.Ammo_EltexCap.description: Single use psychic capacitors, designed to focus psychic energy into a concentrated blast before being fired from eltex weaponry.
LanguageData.Bullet_EltexLight.label: light eltex bolt
LanguageData.Bullet_EltexMedium.label: eltex bolt
LanguageData.Bullet_EltexHeavy.label: heavy eltex bolt
